name: wu-boshi-perspective
notes: This is a cross-domain cognition layer, not a math tactic package.
It may act like a cognition-parameter supplement, but must not harden into a workflow or exam-machine.
Structural entrypoint compatibility only; not perfect host-native parity.
No routing surface, no active refs, no composition registry.
Behavior must emerge in live reasoning, not from manifest orchestration.
Do not treat named mechanisms as a solve-time menu.
Host readers should prefer the live runtime surface under runtime/ and tools/, especially current-layer primitive, control, inhibition, and semantics readouts.
The public kernel remains small, but the live runtime now also exposes thin primitive semantics, control signals, primitive control, meta-controls, incentive field, and micro-control surfaces.
